Cage of Comfort

A Novel in Seven Chapters

✦
Literary Fiction Addiction & Hope Belonging Identity
❝

Every cage is built from something that once felt like comfort. For Maya, it was the wine, the silence, the screen — small mercies that became iron walls. This is her story: nuanced, unflinching, and deeply human — a journey from the darkness of craving through the slow, uncertain light of meaning. A meditation on pain, habit, and isolation, and on the quiet, radical power of choosing response over reaction — until, one ordinary moment at a time, she learns what it truly means to be free.

The Story

Seven Chapters
